# Certified Landing Page Project

This project is a premium landing page for Certified, an AI-powered university credit validation platform that automates credit transfers between universities using AI embeddings, LLM re-rankers, and blockchain anchoring.

## Project Details
- **Framework**: Next.js 14 with App Router
- **Language**: TypeScript
- **Styling**: Tailwind CSS + shadcn/ui
- **Animation**: Framer Motion
- **Analytics**: GA4 integration ready
- **i18n**: Spanish (default) + English
- **SEO**: Complete meta tags, schema.org, sitemap
- **Accessibility**: WCAG 2.2 AA compliant
- **Performance**: Lighthouse 95+ target

## Key Features
- Dual audience targeting (universities/students)
- AI pipeline visualization (5 steps)
- Contrastable AI scoring system
- GDPR/eIDAS compliance
- Blockchain verification
- Interactive demo flows
